info.title: ig
info.description: Provides the IG command line tool for deployment of ScaleOut Invocation Grid worker processes.

commands.name: attach
commands.description: Attaches the ScaleOut service to an already-running IG worker process for debugging.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to
SOSS_IG_CONN environment variable.

options.name: --name
options.description: Required. IG Name.

options.name: --startupSignalPort
options.description:
Required. Port used by worker process to listen for
the IG startup signal from the local ScaleOut
service.

options.name: --object
options.description:
Path to file to send as a parameter object to the
IG. Supplied to IG workers' Startup.Configure
method.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Builds and packs an Invocation Grid into a zip file.

options.name: --buildconfig
options.description: (Default: Release) Build configuration.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime
(win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET
runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host
machines.

options.name: --trim
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused
framework libraries from the package.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --zip
options.description: Deploys the specified IG zip package.

options.name: --assemblyname
options.description:
Name of assembly to execute in IG. Defaults to the
assembly built by current directory's project file.

options.name: --localdev
options.description:
Starts local development IG from build directory without
packaging.

options.name: --preinstalled
options.description:
Starts a pre-installed IG executable. Supply the path to
a preinstalled assembly relative to Preinstalled IG
folder (C:\ProgramData\ScaleOut Software\PreinstalledIG
on Windows, or /usr/share/scaleout/preinstalled-ig on
Linux.), such as "myappDir/myapp.dll"

options.name: --name
options.description:
IG Name. Defaults to the name of the assembly built by
current directory's project file.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN
environment variable.

options.name: --buildconfig
options.description:
(Default: Release) (Ignored if -z is used.) Build
configuration.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a
specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If
omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be
pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.

options.name: --trim
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims
unused framework libraries from the package.

options.name: --params
options.description:
Additional command-line parameter(s) to use when
launching IG processes.

options.name: --object
options.description:
Path to file to send as a parameter object to the IG.
Supplied to IG workers' Startup.Configure method.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Shows a list of running Invocation Grids.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN
environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --name
options.description: IG Name.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to SOSS_IG_CONN
environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
